title: secp256k1 Curve Parameters
description: secp256k1 is Bitcoin's elliptic curve and fixed parameter set for key generation and signatures. Its field, generator point, and group order determine valid key and nonce ranges.

resources.title: Programming Bitcoin
resources.notes: Deeper walk-through of the cryptography, scripting, and transaction mechanics behind this topic.

resources.title: BIP 32: Hierarchical Deterministic Wallets
resources.notes: Uses secp256k1 key derivation primitives in wallet key trees.
